ocr_findings.description: The flowchart diagram ('調達の流れ') in the image contains labelled boxes and arrows: 情報提供依頼書(RFI)の作成 → RFI → 情報をまとめる → 情報 → 提案依頼書(RFP)の作成 → RFP → 提案書の作成 → 提案書 → 調達先の選定 → 契約締結. OCR renders this as img-1.jpeg with only the caption '● 調達の流れ'. All flowchart step labels are absent from the OCR text.

Lesson header banner 'Lesson 05-08 調達計画・実施' rendered as 'Lesson 05-08\n調達計画・実施' with a stray 'A' character inserted between header and image placeholder — likely OCR artifact from the decorative ruler/pencil illustration.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 05-08 on 調達計画・実施. Introductory prose and RFI/RFP mention in body text are faithfully reproduced. However the detailed procurement flowchart (9 labelled steps) is fully lost as an image placeholder — this is a med-severity content loss since the flowchart step names (RFI, RFP, 調達先の選定, 契約締結 etc.) are key exam vocabulary. Score reflects partial content loss.
